articles.title: Solana Becomes Number One Chain in One More Metric
articles.description: Solana has set new industry standard by outstripping Ethereum in weekly stablecoin transfer volume

articles.title: SEC May Delay ETF Decision as Their Work Load Piles Up
articles.description: Bitcoin ETF awaits SEC nod amidst massive paperwork, market hopeful as Bitcoin climbs 7.12% to $45,750 ahead of key decision date.

articles.title: Bitcoin Crosses $45K On First Day Of 2024, Ethereum, Dogecoin Spike As Well: Analyst Says It's 'A Great Year'
articles.description: Bitcoin crossed the psychologically important $45,000 mark on the first day of 2024. The apex cryptocurrency saw an impressive 5.7% gain over 24 hours at the time of publishing. Ethereum and Dogecoin also saw gains of over 3% respectively in the same time frame. read more
